items.title:
Watching history repeat itself  
 
On May 28 we noted a pattern: every time $NVDA diverged from the Nasdaq over the past 2 years, a correction hit soon after.

items.title: Novo's Wegovy Pill Isn't Just Beating Expectations -- It's Obliterating Them. Is the Beaten-Down Stock a Buy Now?
items.body: Novo Nordisk's newly launched Wegovy pill is exceeding expectations with 2 million prescriptions by Q1 2026, expanding the GLP-1 weight-loss market faster than anticipated. Despite the company facing headwinds from patent losses in India and U.S. price cuts, the pill's superior effectiveness compare

items.title: Marvell Technology CEO Matt Murphy Believes This Is The 'Most Beautiful Thing' One Person Can Do For Another And It Can 'Change Their Life'
items.body:
Marvell Technology Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL) CEO Matt Murphy says one of the most powerful things a leader can give another person is confidence, calling it the kind of support that can change the course of a life and career.



Gifford's Confidence Helped Shape Murphy's Career



Speaking on the February episode of "A Bit Personal" with host Jodi Shelton, Murphy said encouragement from Jack Gifford
items.author: Shomik Sen Bhattacharjee

items.title: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Dell, GameStop, Lululemon — And Stocks Take A Hit On Interest Rate Hike Fears
items.body:
Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.



U.S. stocks suffered their sharpest setback in months as stronger-than-expected labor market data fueled fears that the Federal Reserve may need to raise interest rates again. The Nasdaq-100 posted its worst daily decline since the tariff-driven selloff earlier this

items.title: Why LinkedIn Founder Reid Hoffman Is Leaving Microsoft's Board After Nearly A Decade
items.body:
Reid Hoffman, who co-founded LinkedIn in 2002, is stepping down from Microsoft‘s (NASDAQ:MSFT) board of directors to refocus on Manus, his AI-powered drug discovery startup, the company announced Thursday.



LinkedIn Founder Returns to Startup Roots



Hoffman joined the MSFT board in 2016 following the company’s $26.2 billion LinkedIn acquisition. During his tenure, he was present fo
